title: What It Actually Looks Like to Be Strong and Still Need Brothers
caption:
The culture tells you strength means you don't need anybody.

Scripture tells you a cord of three strands isn't easily broken, and it takes three to make one.

"A cord of three strands is not quickly broken." (Ecclesiastes 4:12)

Here's what it actually looks like to be strong and still need brothers who know the real story.

#faith #christianmen #brotherhood #godlymen #manofgod #scripture
